bird.name: Lagden's bushshrike
bird.summary: Lagden's bushshrike (Malaconotus lagdeni) is a bird species in the bushshrike family (Malaconotidae) native to Africa. It is a stocky bird…

locations.name: 理查德·鮑德勒·夏普
locations.summary: 理查德·鮑德勒·夏普（英語：Richard Bowdler Sharpe，1847年11月22日—1909年12月25日）是一位英國動物學家兼鳥類學家，於大英博物館擔任鳥類標本的策展人。在其職涯裡，夏普出版了一些有關鳥類的專著，並整理出博…

relations.subject: Lagden's bushshrike
relations.evidence: Keulemans]] | status = NT | status_system = IUCN3.1 | status_ref = | genus = Malaconotus | species = lagdeni | authority = (Sharpe, 1884) | synonyms = }} Lagden's bushshrike (Malaconotus lagdeni) is a bird species in the bushshrike family (Malaconotidae) native to Africa

relations.subject: Lagden's bushshrike
relations.evidence: Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests in west Africa to an elevation of around 700 m, and subtropical or tropical moist montane forests in Rwanda, Uganda and the Democratic Republic of Congo at an elevation of 2100 to 2800 m. Classified in the IUCN Red List as Near Threatened, it is becoming rare due to habitat loss. One of the 1,487 bird species of eastern Africa, it is considered to be a "very rare mountain forest species". It is one of the 235 different species sighted at Kyabobo National Park.{{cite book |url=https://portals.iucn.org/library/sites/library/files/documents/2010-073.pdf |pages=16–17 |title=Parks and Reserves of Ghana: Management Effectiveness Assessment of Protected Areas |quote=There are at least 235 different species of birds in Kyabobo
relations.object_summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。
